name: Bayou Black Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Bayou Black Recreation Center in Houma, LA! There are 10 concrete and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 7 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and food.

name: Smithridge Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Smithridge Gym in Chauvin, LA! You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.
